testResults.fullName: Model download list & cache GET /models/download/list returns active downloads
Model download list & cache GET /models/managed returns managed models
Model download list & cache GET /models/cache/info returns cache statistics
Available models catalog GET /models/available returns downloadable models
Available models catalog GET /models/sota returns SOTA model registry
Model download trigger POST /models/download with missing model_name returns 400/422
Model download trigger POST /models/download with valid payload starts task
Model download trigger GET /models/download/status/:id with unknown id returns 404
Model info & deletion GET /models/download/:name/info for unknown model returns 404
Model info & deletion DELETE /models/download/:name for unknown model returns 404 or error
SOTA model download POST /models/sota/:model_id with unknown model returns 404/400
TTS health GET /tts/health returns status
TTS engines GET /tts/engines returns list of engines
TTS engines GET /tts/engines/:id/capabilities returns engine capabilities
TTS engines GET /tts/engines/:id/voices returns voice list
TTS stats GET /tts/stats returns synthesis stats
TTS synthesis POST /tts/synthesize rejects empty text
TTS synthesis POST /tts/synthesize returns audio for short text
TTS synthesis POST /tts/synthesize accepts voice and language params
TTS synthesis POST /tts/synthesize rejects text exceeding max length
TTS synthesis POST /audio/synthesize is an alias for TTS synthesis
Registry listing & stats GET /registry/models returns registered models
Registry listing & stats GET /registry/models with format filter
Registry listing & stats GET /registry/stats returns statistics
Registry listing & stats GET /registry/export returns full registry export
Registry registration POST /registry/register with missing path returns 400/422
Registry registration POST /registry/register with nonexistent path returns error
Registry registration POST /registry/scan with nonexistent path returns error
Registry model operations GET /registry/models/:id with unknown id returns 404
Registry model operations POST /registry/models/:id/load with unknown id returns 404
Registry model operations POST /registry/infer with missing model_id returns 400/422
Registry model operations POST /registry/infer with unknown model_id returns 404
API model catalog GET /api/models returns full model registry
API model catalog GET /api/models response is non-empty
API single model info GET /api/models/:model_id returns model details
API single model info GET /api/models/nonexistent returns 404
API downloaded models GET /api/models/downloaded returns downloaded models list
API model download POST /api/models/download with missing model_id returns 400/422
API model download POST /api/models/download with unknown model_id returns 404/400
API model comparison GET /api/models/comparison returns comparison data
Image health GET /image/health returns status
Image security stats GET /image/security/stats returns statistics
Image security validation POST /image/validate/security with PNG returns security result
Image security validation POST /image/validate/security with invalid security_level is handled
Image security validation POST /image/validate/security without image returns 400
Image processing (secure) POST /image/process/secure with PNG returns result
Image processing (secure) POST /image/process/secure without body returns 400
